We study polysemanticity in transformer models using sparse autoencoders.
Our method trains SAEs on residual stream activations.

References
[1] Elhage, N. et al. (2022). Toy models of superposition.
[2] Bau, D. et al. (2024). NNsight and NDIF: Democratizing Access to Open-Weight
    Foundation Model Internals. ICLR 2025.
[3] Conmy, A. et al. (2023). Towards Automated Circuit Discovery.
